basic_details.short_information: National Health Systems Resource Centre (NHSRC) Consultant-Surveillance, M&E and Research Recruitment 2026 Notification has been released on the official website of NHSRC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NHSRC Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate qualification in Public Health (MPH)/ Master in Hospital Administration with relevant undergraduate discipline MBBS/ BDS with more than 2 years of work experience OR Postgraduate qualifications in Public Health (MPH)/ Masters in Hospital Administration with BSW/ BA/ BSc with 10+ years of Work experience.
qualification.details: Consultant-Surveillance, M&E and Research: Postgraduate qualification in Public Health (MPH)/ Master in Hospital Administration with relevant undergraduate discipline MBBS/ BDS and more than 2 years of work experience in implementation/service delivery for a National Program. Consultant-Surveillance, M&E and Research: Postgraduate qualifications in Public Health (MPH)/ Masters in Hospital Administration with BSW/ BA/ BSc and 10+ years of Work experience in implementation/service delivery for a National Program.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHSRC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NHSRC Consultant Recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NHSRC Consultant-Surveillance, M&E and Research post is 12th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Postgraduate qualification in Public Health (MPH) or Master in Hospital Administration with MBBS/BDS and over 2 years of experience, OR the same postgraduate qualifications with BSW/BA/BSc and over 10 years of experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this position is 45 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Consultant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 60,000/- to Rs. 1,20,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NHSRC Consultant position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted online through the NHSRC website. The detailed application procedure is provided in the 'How to Apply' section.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity with the National Health Systems Resource Centre.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the National Health Systems Resource Centre (NHSRC) for the NVHCP, MoH&FW program.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process may include a Written Test, if applicable. Further details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the links to the official notification PDF and the online application form in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
